heading: Free passage to harbor of Michigan City, Indiana
label: 6 Free passage to harbor of Michigan City, Indiana
text: The passage of vessels to and from the harbor of Michigan City, in Indiana, shall be free and not subject to toll or charge.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 5247 derived from acts , ; , .June 23, 1866, ch. 138, § 114 Stat. 73Mar. 2, 1867, ch. 144, § 214 Stat. 421
